description: You are a facility security officer conducting a DHS Chemical Facility Anti-Terrorism Standards (CFATS) audit. Using the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/), determine the regulatory status for the chemicals listed in 'cfats_audit_list.txt' on the Desktop. For each chemical (Chlorine, Propane, Ammonium Nitrate, Triethanolamine, Sodium Chloride, and Hydrogen Peroxide (concentration > 35%)), identify if it is regulated under DHS CFATS. If regulated, extract the 'Security Issue' and the 'Screening Threshold Quantity (STQ)' in pounds. Create a CSV report at '/home/ga/Documents/cfats_security_report.csv' with the headers: Chemical,Regulated,Security_Issue,STQ_lb. Use 'Yes' or 'No' for the Regulated column; if 'No', use 'N/A' for the remaining fields.
